title: Perfect Vanilla
description: Perfect Vanilla — pure Minecraft, perfectly optimized for performance and stability.

# Perfect Vanilla — The Refined Minecraft Experience

| ![Turbo Performance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8440003d61a32fd7dd89a89da8edcf3c95512b4b_0.webp) | ![Smart QoL Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e66f0ae1f86dee7999f1260f26594a00b30c2072_0.webp) | ![Visual & Audio Polish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8eeba6cdf013a3854077af84d9e97e3af0392afc_0.webp) |
|---|---|---|
| **High-performance gameplay** with custom tuning | **Quality-of-life enhancements** that keep it vanilla | **Polished visuals & sound** designed for immersion |

---

## 🧭 About This Modpack

**Perfect Vanilla** redefines how Minecraft should feel — smooth, stable, and immersive, while staying completely faithful to the original game.  
It focuses on **technical performance**, **aesthetic refinement**, and **user comfort**, without changing the game’s core identity.

Every improvement is subtle but meaningful: faster chunk loading, optimized memory handling, enhanced lighting, more natural audio, and intelligent interface tweaks — all built on top of the pure vanilla foundation.

This modpack doesn’t add new blocks, tools, or biomes.  
Instead, it enhances Minecraft’s **core systems**, **visual fidelity**, and **responsiveness**, ensuring that everything looks, sounds, and performs better — just as it should.

---

## ⚙️ Key Features

- ⚡ **Optimized performance** — faster world generation, smoother frame pacing  
- 🧠 **Smart QoL tools** — improved inventory, crafting, and interface usability  
- 🎨 **Enhanced visuals & sound** — handcrafted shaders, subtle ambient effects  
- 🧩 **Full mod compatibility** — no conflicts or game-breaking dependencies  
- 🔧 **Lightweight structure** — easy to maintain, quick to update  
- 🛠️ **Stable foundation** — designed for long-term worlds and continuous play  

---

## 🖥️ System Requirements

| Component | Minimum | Recommended |
|------------|-----------|-------------|
| **RAM** | 8 GiB | 12 GiB + |
| **VRAM** | 4 GiB | 8 GiB + |
| **GPU** | GTX 1060 / RX 580 | RX 7900 XT / RTX 4070 + |
| **Storage** | SSD | NVMe SSD |

---

## ⚠️ Usage Notes

- **Singleplayer Focus:** Perfect Vanilla is primarily designed for **single-player gameplay**.  
  Some client-side mods may conflict with multiplayer anti-cheat systems.  
- **Performance Impact:** System stability depends on CPU frequency, temperature, and driver configuration.  
- **Launchers:** Use a **third-party launcher** such as Prism or ATLauncher for easy installation and management.  
- **RAM Allocation:** At least **8 GiB** is required; **12 GiB** is recommended for maximum performance.  

---

## 🧩 Philosophy & Maintenance

Perfect Vanilla is maintained as a **personal, long-term project** dedicated to refining the vanilla experience —  
not to reinvent it. Updates focus on **optimization**, **compatibility**, and **technical excellence**.  

The philosophy is simple:  
> *“Enhance everything — change nothing.”*

By avoiding unnecessary complexity and respecting the vanilla core, Perfect Vanilla delivers a stable, elegant, and timeless Minecraft experience for purists and performance enthusiasts alike.

---

✨ **Perfect Vanilla** — Where the original game meets modern optimization. ✨

**Description version 3.0**
